title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: Employees can enroll in health insurance and dental options during the annual open enrollment period, which typically occurs in November. If you are a new hire, you have 30 days from your start date to complete your enrollment. To enroll, log in to the employee portal and navigate to the 'Benefits' section, where you can review available plans and make your selections. If you wish to make changes outside of the open enrollment period, you must qualify for a special enrollment event, such as a marriage, birth of a child, or loss of other coverage. For assistance, please contact the HR benefits team at hrbenefits@company.com or call the HR hotline at (555) 123-4567. Remember to have your dependents' information ready if you plan to add them to your coverage.
